title: HALL Winery Tasting
description:
Join us on Wednesday, April 8, from 4 - 7 PM at Whispering Vine - South Creek for a tasting featuring HALL Winery.

Tasting Fee: $30 per person (Buy any bottle from the tasting and the tasting fee will be refunded.)

Featured Wines:

  • Perrier-Jouët "Belle Epoque" Brut Rosé Champagne 2013 – 96 JS, 95 WE, 95 JD, 93 WS – A subtle, delicate vintage rosé Champagne with strawberry, peony, kumquat and white currant on the nose, followed by pink grapefruit, mandarin and brioche on the palate.
  • Rombauer Cabernet Sauvignon 2022 – Sale $59.99 – A rich Napa Cabernet with red raspberry, red currant, mint and savory herb aromas, then black currant, creme de cassis and baking spice on the palate with moderate tannins and bright acidity.
  • Twomey Sauvignon Blanc 2023 – Sale $26.99, Winery $36 – A layered Sauvignon Blanc shaped by Napa Valley and Russian River Valley fruit, bringing tropical guava and papaya tones alongside crisp minerality, depth and freshness.
  • Chalk Hill Russian River Chardonnay 2023 – $26.99, Winery $43 – A smooth Russian River Chardonnay with orchard fruit, lemon curd and gentle oak spice layered over lively acidity and a creamy, composed finish.
  • Broadley Willamette Valley Pinot Noir 2024 – 92 WE – A low-intervention Willamette Valley Pinot Noir with bright red fruit, floral lift and layered spice, finishing silky and fresh in Broadley’s classic Oregon style.

Come explore HALL Winery Wines and find your favorite bottle. Buy a tasting bottle and your fee is refunded.
